nasb.text: Then Jephthah went with the elders of Gilead, and the people made him head and chief over them; and Jephthah spoke all his words before the Lord at Mizpah.

esv.text: So Jephthah went with the elders of Gilead, and the people made him head and leader over them. And Jephthah spoke all his words before the Lord at Mizpah.

cnv.text: 於是耶弗他與基列的長老一同回去了，眾人就立耶弗他作他們的首領，作他們的統帥；耶弗他在米斯巴，在耶和華面前，把自己的一切話都說了出來。

ccb.text: 于是，耶弗他便跟他们一起回去。民众拥立他做他们的首领和元帅。耶弗他在米斯巴将之前所说的话在耶和华面前重申一遍。
